message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
namespace php {
  namespace SPL {
    interface ArrayAccess {
      +offsetExists( offset )
      +offsetGet( offset )
      +offsetSet( offset, value )
      +offsetUnset( offset )
    }

    interface Countable {
      +count()
    }

    interface Iterator {
      +current()
      +next()
      +key()
      +valid()
      +rewind()
    }

    class SplFixedArray
  }
}

namespace Digitick {
  namespace Foundation {
    namespace Collection {
      interface InterfaceCollection {
        +addAll(InterfaceCollection elementCollection)
        +clear()
        +contains(element)
        +containsAll(InterfaceCollection elementCollection)
        +isEmpty()
        +removeAll(interfaceCollection elementCollection)
        +size()
        +toArray()
      }

      interface InterfaceList {
        +add(offset, element)
        +remove(offset)
        +get(offset)
        +set(offset, element)
        +indexOf(element)
        +subList(fromIndex, toIndex)
      }

      interface InterfaceSet {
        +add(element)
        +get(element)
        +remove(element)
      }

      abstract class TraitCollection {
        -indexOf(element, collectionObject)
        -contains(element, collectionObject)
      }

      abstract class AbstractScalarSet {
        #DEFAULT_SIZE
        #nextAvailableOffset
        #storageArray
        +increaseSize(quantity = 1)
        +decreaseSize(quantity = 1)
        +shift(fromOffset)
        +removeOffset(offset)
      }

      abstract class AbstractObjectSet {
        #storageArray
        #nextAvailableOffset
        +set(element, data)
      }

      abstract class TraitTypedCollection {
        #CLASSORTYPENAME
        -checkElementType(element)
      }

      abstract class AbstractList

      abstract class AbstractTypedObjectSet

      abstract class AbstractTypedList

      abstract class AbstractTypedScalarSet

      class BaseList

      class IntList

      class StringList

      class BaseObjectSet

      class BaseScalarSet

      class IntScalarSet

      class StringScalarSet

      InterfaceCollection <|-- InterfaceList
      InterfaceCollection <|-- InterfaceSet
      InterfaceCollection ..> TraitCollection : uses
      InterfaceList ..> TraitCollection : uses
      InterfaceList ..> ArrayAccess : implements
      InterfaceList ..> Iterator : implements
      InterfaceList ..> Countable : implements
      InterfaceSet ..> TraitCollection : uses
      InterfaceSet ..> ArrayAccess : implements
      InterfaceSet ..> Countable : implements
      TraitCollection ..> ArrayAccess : implements
      TraitCollection ..> Iterator : implements
      TraitCollection ..> Countable : implements
      AbstractScalarSet --|> TraitCollection
      AbstractScalarSet --|> InterfaceSet
      AbstractObjectSet --|> TraitCollection
      AbstractObjectSet --|> InterfaceSet
      TraitTypedCollection --|> TraitCollection
      AbstractList --|> TraitCollection
      AbstractList --|> InterfaceList
      AbstractList --|> SplFixedArray
      AbstractTypedObjectSet --|> TraitCollection
      AbstractTypedObjectSet --|> TraitTypedCollection
      AbstractTypedObjectSet --|> AbstractObjectSet
      AbstractTypedList --|> TraitCollection
      AbstractTypedList --|> TraitTypedCollection
      AbstractTypedList --|> AbstractList
      AbstractTypedScalarSet --|> TraitCollection
      AbstractTypedScalarSet --|> TraitTypedCollection
      AbstractTypedScalarSet --|> AbstractScalarSet
      BaseList --|> AbstractList
      IntList --|> AbstractTypedList
      StringList --|> AbstractTypedList
      BaseObjectSet --|> AbstractObjectSet
      BaseScalarSet --|> AbstractScalarSet
      IntScalarSet --|> AbstractTypedScalarSet
      StringScalarSet --|> AbstractTypedScalarSet
    }
  }
}
@enduml
```
